top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Wicklow 200's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
Wicklow 200's mountain passes forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 124 miles.
81ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
10,020ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
At mile 60 of 124, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
At Wicklow 200, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Wicklow 200. Train it until it feels boring.
10,020ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Wicklow 200, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 124 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mountain passes. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 10,020ft of climbing on mountain passes does to your power file on race day.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Wicklow 200’s 124 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Wicklow 200. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Wicklow 200 requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mountain passes to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, Gravel Specific, and TT Threshold to prepare you for 124 miles of mountain passes in County Wicklow, Ireland.
